channel.title: Kehinde Abe | Data Engineer Portfolio
channel.description: Technical writing on data engineering, pipelines, machine learning, and growth.

item.title: Building a Portfolio That Scales Beyond a Pretty Homepage
item.description: Why a strong engineering portfolio needs case studies, publishing infrastructure, and search-friendly structure.

item.title: What a Weather ETL Project Taught Me About Data Engineering
item.description: A reflection on using a small but complete ETL build to learn orchestration, observability, and operational thinking.

item.title: Machine Learning Projects Become Stronger When People Can Actually Use Them
item.description: Why I like pairing models with simple interfaces instead of stopping at notebook outputs.

item.title: Building a Sarcasm Detection System with LSTM and GloVe: A Complete Guide
item.description: Before We Begin :) Detecting sarcasm is more than just spotting ironic statements. It involves...

item.title: Downloading and Converting YouTube Videos to MP3 using yt-dlp in Python
item.description: The popularity of video content on websites like YouTube has increased user demand for audio...

item.title: TinyLlama LLM: A Step-by-Step Guide to Implementing the 1.1B Model on Google Colab
item.description: LLM, or Large Language Model, is an advanced artificial intelligence program designed for...

item.title: The Importance of Upholding Data Privacy: A Data Scientist's Responsibility
item.description: Introduction As a data scientist, I understand the importance of data privacy and security. Data privacy refers to the protection of personal information and sensitive data from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure. It is essential for every indiv...

item.title: A Guide to Data Cleaning and Preparation for Data Science
item.description: Data is the lifeblood of any successful data science project, but it's not always in its pristine form. Unfortunately, raw data often comes with missing values, duplicates, outliers and other anomalies that can significantly impact the accuracy of yo...

item.title: Building an Image repository with Node.js, Express, MongoDB and Multer
item.description: Quick Summary With the help of this tutorial, you can learn how to build and integrate an Image repository by uploading files on the server with the help of Multer and Express in Node.js. This tutorial will also show you a step-by-step process of int...

item.title: Getting Started With Automated Testing Using Jest for JavaScript Applications
item.description: What does testing mean? what is automated testing? Do we really need to test our code? How do I achieve this? what should I test? These are popularly asked questions and this article aims to provide answers for them. Firstly, we need to understand t...
